title: Assertion error overriding top-level parameter on command line.
body:
With recent changes in Icarus we have error while compiling some [cocotb](https://github.com/cocotb/cocotb) examples:

File: [matrix_multiplier.sv](https://github.com/cocotb/cocotb/blob/master/examples/matrix_multiplier/hdl/matrix_multiplier.sv)

Command:
```bash
iverilog -Pmatrix_multiplier.DATA_WIDTH=32 -g2012 matrix_multiplier.sv
```

Error:
```
matrix_multiplier.sv:14: assert: elab_type.cc:86: failed assertion scope
sh: line 1:  1529 Done                    /usr/local/lib/ivl/ivlpp -L -F"/tmp/ivrlg21cb633eb" -f"/tmp/ivrlg1cb633eb" -p"/tmp/ivrli1cb633eb"
      1530 Aborted                 (core dumped) | /usr/local/lib/ivl/ivl -C"/tmp/ivrlh1cb633eb" -C"/usr/local/lib/ivl/vvp.conf" -- -
```

Some results on Ubuntu and Centos7.
code_blocks:
matrix_multiplier.sv:14: assert: elab_type.cc:86: failed assertion scope
sh: line 1:  1529 Done                    /usr/local/lib/ivl/ivlpp -L -F"/tmp/ivrlg21cb633eb" -f"/tmp/ivrlg1cb633eb" -p"/tmp/ivrli1cb633eb"
      1530 Aborted                 (core dumped) | /usr/local/lib/ivl/ivl -C"/tmp/ivrlh1cb633eb" -C"/usr/local/lib/ivl/vvp.conf" -- -
